text.div:
This value set includes codes based on the following rules:

  • Import all the codes that are contained in http://hl7.org/fhir/us/mcode/ValueSet/mcode-teleradiotherapy-photon-beam-technique-vs
  • Import all the codes that are contained in http://hl7.org/fhir/us/mcode/ValueSet/mcode-teleradiotherapy-electron-beam-technique-vs
  • Import all the codes that are contained in http://hl7.org/fhir/us/mcode/ValueSet/mcode-teleradiotherapy-neutron-beam-technique-vs
  • Import all the codes that are contained in http://hl7.org/fhir/us/mcode/ValueSet/mcode-teleradiotherapy-carbon-ion-beam-technique-vs
  • Import all the codes that are contained in http://hl7.org/fhir/us/mcode/ValueSet/mcode-teleradiotherapy-proton-beam-technique-vs

name: TeleradiotherapyTechniqueVS
title: Teleradiotherapy Technique Value Set
description: Codes describing the techniques of teleradiotherapy (external beam) procedures.
